bird.name: Cassin's sparrow
bird.summary: Cassin's sparrow (Peucaea cassinii) is a medium-sized sparrow. This passerine bird's range is from western Nebraska to north-central Mexico.

relations.subject: Cassin's sparrow
relations.evidence: Cassin's sparrow can commonly be found in brushy grassland and is nomadic. Between 1955 and 1989, there was a below average amount of this species although the number rises and falls each year. The sparrow can be found in south-central states
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Cassin's sparrow
relations.evidence: It appears that relative proportions of grass and shrubs in acceptable Cassin's sparrow habitat cover a wide range from grassland habitats with a very sparse distribution of shrubs to shrubland habitats with a grass cover
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
